versions.title: Terms of Service
versions.content:
## Terms of Service

Welcome to **Purple Dot**, a network — seeded by EkStep Foundation — that connects persons with disabilities to assistive devices, health services, and rehabilitation support.

### 1. Who can use Purple Dot
Purple Dot is currently **invite-only**. By continuing you confirm the information you provide is accurate and that you are the person it describes or are authorised to act on their behalf (for example, as a family member or caregiver).

### 2. What Purple Dot is
Purple Dot is a **discovery and matching network** that helps you find relevant assistive devices, services, and support providers. It is **not a medical service** and does not provide medical, diagnostic, or clinical advice. Providers listed on the network are independent; we are not a party to, and are not responsible for, any service or transaction between participants.

### 3. Your responsibilities
- Provide accurate information about your needs.
- Use the network lawfully and treat other participants and providers with respect.
- Use any contact details you receive only for the purpose for which they were shared.

### 4. Suspension
We may pause or remove access for misuse or for activity that harms other participants.

### 5. Service "as is"
Purple Dot is in active development and is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without warranties.

### 6. Governing law
These terms are governed by the laws of India. Questions or grievances: **support@onest.network**.

versions.title: Privacy Policy
versions.content:
## Privacy Policy

We understand that information about disability and support needs is personal, and we handle it with care. This policy explains what **Purple Dot** (seeded by EkStep Foundation) collects, why, and your choices.

### What we collect
- **Contact details** — your name, email, and phone number.
- **Support-related information** you choose to provide — such as the devices, services, or support you are looking for, and your location.

### Why we use it
We use your information to **match you with relevant assistive devices, health services, and rehabilitation support**, and to make your request discoverable to relevant providers within the network.

### When your contact details are shared
Your name, email, and phone number are shared with a provider **only when you initiate or accept a connection**. **We never sell your data** and do not use it for advertising.

### Your control
You can **update** your profile from the portal at any time. To have your information removed, contact us at **support@onest.network**.

### Retention
We keep your information only for as long as it is needed to connect you within the network.

### Grievances
For any privacy question or request, contact **support@onest.network**.

versions.statement: The information collected will be used to match you with assistive devices, health services, and support providers. Tap "I agree to continue".
I agree to share my contact details (name, email, phone) with this seeker / provider if they accept my request. The request may be cancelled at any time.
